name: Archelon

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.text: The archelon can breathe air and water.

text:
# Archelon

*Huge Beast (Dinosaur), Unaligned*

A house-sized sea turtle that plies warm currents, placid until provoked.

### Actions

**Bite.** Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) Piercing damage.
